_doc.agent-identity: Display name and version shown at agent startup
_doc.network.network_name: Hardhat network name to connect to (must match hardhat.config.js)
_doc.network.rpc_url: HTTP RPC endpoint for the network
_doc.network.kill_faucet_addr: Deployed KILLFaucet contract address (used by seed/sniper init)
_doc.network.weth_addr: WETH contract address on this network
_doc.network.uniswap_v3_factory: Uniswap V3 factory — used when computing pool addresses
_doc.network.fee_tier: Pool fee tier in hundredths of a bip (10000 = 1%)
_doc.network.wss_url: WebSocket RPC endpoint — used by onBlock() for live block events
_doc.network.block_explorer: Block explorer base URL for tx links (no trailing slash)
_doc.settings.SUBGRAPH_URL: Goldsky subgraph endpoint for kill/stack event queries
_doc.settings.MIN_SPAWN: Minimum number of units to spawn in any single spawn call
_doc.settings.HUB_STACK: Stack ID used as the home base / fortress hub
_doc.settings.MAX_GAS_PRICE_GWEI: Hard cap on gas price; transactions skip if network exceeds this
_doc.settings.ETH_PRICE_USD: Manual ETH price used for USD display values (update as needed)
_doc.settings.TOTAL_SUPPLY: Total KILL token supply — used for market cap calculations
_doc.settings.BLOCK_DELTA: Number of blocks between each agent run cycle
_doc.settings.KILL_MULTIPLIER: Spawn multiplier vs enemy power; e.g. 3 = spawn 3× enemy force
_doc.settings.seed.*: SEED_AMOUNT: units per spawn; BATCH_SEED: stacks seeded per run
_doc.settings.fortress.*: TARGET_UNITS: total power before combat; REPLENISH_AMT: units spawned per top-up; HUB_PERIMETER: Manhattan radius guarded
_doc.settings.sniper.*: SPAWN_PROFITABILITY_THRESHOLD: minimum bounty/cost ratio to attack
_doc.settings.aftershock.*: MAX_KILL: skip targets whose effective power exceeds this value
_doc.settings.market-maker.*: ETH_TARGET/KILL_TARGET: desired liquidity amounts; MCAP_MIN/MAX_USD: price range for LP position
_doc.settings.market-taker.*: ACQUIRE: token to buy (KILL|ETH); SPEND: token to sell; TARGET_PRICE_USD: trigger price; BUDGET: session spend cap; BUY_INCREMENT: ETH per swap; BATCH_SIZE: swaps per multicall
